headline: Iran Launches Ballistic Missile Attack Toward Israel
summary: The IDF detected an incoming Iranian ballistic missile attack launched toward Israel as of 23:06 UTC on March 10, 2026. Air raid sirens were expected to activate across Israeli territory imminently. No confirmed impact or interception details are available at this time — event_type defaulted to 'Attack and Miss' pending damage confirmation, as IDF detection typically precedes active air defense engagement.

secondary_markets.name: Gold
secondary_markets.reason: Classic safe-haven surge triggered by direct state-on-state ballistic missile attack in a nuclear-adjacent theater.

trade_position: The highest-conviction hidden opportunity is long CBOE Volatility Index futures (VX) or short-dated S&P 500 put spreads — a confirmed Iranian ballistic missile strike on Israel risks rapid US involvement, triggering a global risk-off episode far beyond what regional defense equities price in. Oil call options (front-month Brent) offer asymmetric upside if Strait of Hormuz rhetoric escalates within 24 hours of this event.

messages.text_en: 🚨ALERT: The IDF has detected an incoming Iranian ballistic missile attack launched toward Israel. Sirens are expected to sound shortly.
